summarization.a: The figure shows the XRD pattern of a single-crystal AlN film, with different peaks appearing at specific 2θ angles that correspond to the (002) at 36.0 degrees, (101) at 38.1 degrees and (00001) at 41.7 degrees, crystal planes.

a.question: Which crystal planes can be seen in the figure?
a.answer: (002), (101) and (0001) crystal planes can be observed.

a.question: Which species can be observed in the XRD pattern?
Which crystal plane exhibit the lower intensity peak?
a.answer: The lower-intensity peak corresponds to the (101) plane of AlN.

a.question: What effect does the Al2O3 (sapphire) substrate have on the XRD pattern?
a.answer: The presence of the Al2O3 as a substrate produces a peak close to 41.7°, which can easily be distinguished from those corresponding to the AlN film.
